from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_d26ff1f984614ee98b94f0ec24c7beb1_ogluk5vg\app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from flask_login import LoginManager, login_user, login_required, logout_user, current_user
4	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
5	from models import db, User, Task
6	from datetime import datetime
7	
8	app = Flask(__name__)
9	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'thisisasecretkey'
10	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///db.sqlite'
11	
12	db.init_app(app)
13	
14	login_manager = LoginManager()
15	login_manager.login_view = 'login'
16	login_manager.init_app(app)
17	
18	@login_manager.user_loader
19	def load_user(user_id):
20	    return User.query.get(int(user_id))
21	
22	@app.route('/')
23	def index():
24	    if current_user.is_authenticated:
25	        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
26	    return redirect(url_for('login'))
27	
28	@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
29	def login():
30	    if request.method == 'POST':
31	        username = request.form.get('username')
32	        password = request.form.get('password')
33	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
34	        if user and check_password_hash(user.password, password):
35	            login_user(user)
36	            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
37	        else:
38	            flash('Login failed. Check your username and password.')
39	    return render_template('login.html')
40	
41	@app.route('/register', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
42	def register():
43	    if request.method == 'POST':
44	        username = request.form.get('username')
45	        password = request.form.get('password')
46	        
47	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
48	        if user:
49	            flash('Username already exists.')
50	            return redirect(url_for('register'))
51	        
52	        new_user = User(username=username, password=generate_password_hash(password, method='pbkdf2:sha256'))
53	        db.session.add(new_user)
54	        db.session.commit()
55	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
56	    return render_template('register.html')
57	
58	@app.route('/logout')
59	@login_required
60	def logout():
61	    logout_user()
62	    return redirect(url_for('login'))
63	
64	@app.route('/dashboard')
65	@login_required
66	def dashboard():
67	    tasks = Task.query.filter_by(user_id=current_user.id).all()
68	    return render_template('dashboard.html', tasks=tasks)
69	
70	@app.route('/task/create', methods=['POST'])
71	@login_required
72	def create_task():
73	    title = request.form.get('title')
74	    description = request.form.get('description')
75	    priority = request.form.get('priority')
76	    due_date_str = request.form.get('due_date')
77	    
78	    due_date = None
79	    if due_date_str:
80	        due_date = datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
81	        
82	    new_task = Task(title=title, description=description, priority=priority, due_date=due_date, owner=current_user)
83	    db.session.add(new_task)
84	    db.session.commit()
85	    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
86	
87	@app.route('/task/done/<int:task_id>')
88	@login_required
89	def mark_done(task_id):
90	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
91	    if task.owner != current_user:
92	        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
93	    task.is_done = True
94	    db.session.commit()
95	    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
96	
97	@app.route('/task/delete/<int:task_id>')
98	@login_required
99	def delete_task(task_id):
100	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
101	    if task.owner != current_user:
102	        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
103	    db.session.delete(task)
104	    db.session.commit()
105	    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
106	
107	if __name__ == '__main__':
108	    with app.app_context():
109	        db.create_all()
110	    app.run(debug=True)

USER_CONTEXT:
- Build a task management web application using Flask, SQLAlchemy, and Flask-Login.
- Requirements: User authentication, Task CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete), priority levels, and due dates.

- 1: Initialize project and directory structure - status: done
- 2: Create database models (User, Task) - status: in_progress
- 3: Implement authentication (Register, Login, Logout) - status: pending

- 5: Create frontend templates (HTML/CSS) - status: pending
- 6: Final testing and verification - status: pending

- `models.py` created with `User` and `Task` models.

- Implement application logic and routes.
- Create frontend templates.
